name: peak-public-api-client-csharp-codegen
description: Pinned OpenAPI generator toolchain for KyuzanInc.Peak.PublicApiClient. Codegen tooling only — not shipped, not part of the .NET build. Used by scripts/generate-public-api-client.sh via `npm ci` so the generator wrapper + its npm deps resolve from the committed lockfile instead of a live npm path.
